# Mifamurtide 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Mifamurtide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Mifamurtide</strong> 目前有 <strong>13 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Mifamurtide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Mepact is indicated in children, adolescents and young adults for the treatment of high-grade resectable non-metastatic osteosarcoma after macroscopically complete surgical resection. It is used in...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>filariasis（93.1%）</li>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（86.7%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（85.2%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant familial hematuria-retinal arteriolar tortuosity-contractures syndrome（84.1%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（83.8%）</li>
<li>brain small vessel disease 1 with or without ocular anomalies（83.3%）</li>
<li>open-angle glaucoma（82.9%）</li>
<li>cholecystolithiasis（81.8%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（77.8%）</li>
<li>diabetic nephropathy（77.6%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（76.6%）</li>
<li>thromboangiitis obliterans（75.4%）</li>
<li>unclassified myelodysplastic syndrome（73.4%）</li>
<li>refractory cytopenia of childhood（71.8%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the long arm of chromosome 5（71.8%）</li>
<li>myelodysplastic syndrome（71.0%）</li>
<li>aregenerative anemia（70.9%）</li>
<li>severe congenital hypochromic anemia with ringed sideroblasts（70.4%）</li>
<li>tendinitis（70.0%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（69.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/mifamurtide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
